worker.objective: Create one or more new general task(s) in tasks/ according to: {{prompt}}. Report what was created.
instructions: Read tasks/demo-greetings.json and tasks/boost.json as format reference.

Each new task must have: task (id, objective, instructions, entrypoint), plans (array of {id, role, mode}), optional params, optional steps, optional skill_refs (array of skill IDs (from knowledge API); include when the task output references implementation skills, e.g. analysis/breakdown tasks).
If the new task invokes sub-tasks (via skill_refs or breakdown), ensure its instructions specify that {{scope}} is passed to each sub-task by default.
Output JSON files to tasks/ with descriptive names (e.g. tasks/my-feature.json).
Do not modify existing tasks (demo-greetings.json, boost.json, euler.json) or src/.

params.prompt: Create a general task that does X.
